name: @robocodejs
description: Welcome to RobocodeJs, [a browser-based programming game](https://robocodeJs.com) for creating Javascript artificial intellegence that enables your bots compete for fame and glory! Brainstorm your own winning strategy, program your bot, and set it lose in the arena in teams of one or more to defeat your competition.

scripts.start: concurrently --names proxy,server,ui --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta "node index.js" "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix ui run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix ui install
scripts.build: npm --prefix ui run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.release: npm run build && npm --prefix server run release
scripts.bundle: npm run build && npm --prefix server run bundle
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix ui test
scripts.coverage: npm --prefix server run test:coverage && npm --prefix ui run test:coverage && npm run coverage:check
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix ui run lint

author: Lee Adcock <lee@robocodejs.com>
